narration: You're paying for over twelve subscriptions right now. But here's the wild part — you can probably only name about four. And the rest are quietly wrecking your retirement.
visual: Phone screen showing a grid of 12 subscription app icons (streaming, music, fitness, cloud, gaming, etc.), dollar coins floating away from the screen. Text overlay: YOU HAVE 12+ SUBSCRIPTIONS

narration: The average American spends two hundred and nineteen dollars a month on subscriptions. That's twenty-six hundred bucks a year — mostly on stuff you barely touch.
visual: Animated dollar counter ticking from $0 up to $219/month, then annual total of $2,628 appearing below it. Large bold numbers on a light background.

narration: Here's the gut-punch: if you invested that two-nineteen a month at seven percent returns, in thirty years you'd have two hundred and sixty-five thousand dollars. Gone to subscriptions.
visual: Side-by-side bar chart: left bar (red, short) labeled SUBSCRIPTIONS, right bar (green, tall) labeled INVESTED @7%. $265K label springs in above the tall bar.

narration: The psychology is genius — and evil. Fourteen ninety-nine a month is below your brain's pain threshold for spending. That's not an accident, that's a product decision.
visual: SVG credit card with $14.99 highlighted in red, brain icon below with 'PAIN THRESHOLD' zone marked. Arrow pointing to the price in the danger zone.

narration: Number one: open your bank statement. Number two: filter for recurring charges. Most people find they can cut eighty to a hundred-twenty dollars a month — instantly.
visual: Bank statement showing recurring subscription line items, one by one getting a strikethrough line drawn through them as coins are saved. Green checkmarks appear.

narration: That eighty dollars a month you free up, invested at seven percent for thirty years, becomes over a hundred thousand dollars. Do the audit today — it takes twenty minutes.
visual: Piggy bank growing in size as coins drop in from above, green compound growth progress bar filling from left to right. CTA card: DO THE AUDIT TODAY | 20 MINUTES = $100K+
